meta.title: 全量知识库 - 高频词实际应用语料
design_principles: 矩阵式覆盖:18主场景×100子情境

dialogue.text: Hello! It is nice to meet you. My name is Alex.
dialogue.translation: 你好！很高兴认识你。我叫Alex。

dialogue.text: Hi Alex, I am Sam. How are you today?
I am doing great, thank you for asking.
That is good to hear. Is this your first time here?
dialogue.translation: 很高兴听到。这是你第一次来吗？

dialogue.text: Yes, it is. But I think I will come again.
dialogue.translation: 是的。但我想我还会再来的。

dialogue.text: I hope you enjoy your time here. Let me know if you need anything.
dialogue.translation: 希望你在这里开心。需要什么就告诉我。

dialogue.text: Hello, I would like to order please.
Welcome. What would you like to have today?
What do you recommend? I am very hungry.
Our special today is very popular. Would you like to try it?
dialogue.translation: 今天的特价菜很受欢迎。要试试吗？

dialogue.text: That sounds good. I will take that please.
dialogue.translation: 听起来不错。就来这个吧。

dialogue.text: Great choice. I will bring it right away.

Excuse me, I need some help.
Sure, what can I do for you?
I am trying to find the station. Is it far from here?
dialogue.translation: 我想找车站。离这里远吗？

dialogue.text: It is not too far. Walk straight for five minutes.
Thank you. I will go that way.
You are welcome. Have a safe trip.

Hello, I am looking for something.
Can I help you find anything?
Yes, what is the price of this item?
It is on sale this week. Very good price.
I will take it. Do you accept cards?
Yes, we do. I will ring it up for you.

Hello, I have a reservation.
Welcome. May I see your passport please?
Here you go. I requested a quiet room.
dialogue.translation: 给您。我要求了安静的房间。

dialogue.text: Yes, we have a nice room ready on the third floor.
dialogue.translation: 好的，我们在三楼准备好了房间。

dialogue.text: Thank you. What time is breakfast?
Breakfast is from seven to ten in the restaurant downstairs.
dialogue.translation: 早餐七点到十点，在楼下餐厅。

dialogue.text: Hello, I need to see a doctor.
What seems to be the problem?
I have not been feeling well for a few days.
Please describe your symptoms. Do you have any pain?
dialogue.translation: 请描述症状。你哪里疼吗？

dialogue.text: I have a headache and I feel very tired.
The doctor will see you shortly. Please have a seat.

Good morning. Let us start the meeting.
I have prepared the report you asked for.
dialogue.translation: 我准备好了您要的报告。

dialogue.text: Great. Please share the main findings.
The results are very positive. We met our goals.
dialogue.translation: 结果非常积极。我们达成了目标。

dialogue.text: Excellent work. Thank you for your effort.
It was a team effort. I am happy with the outcome.
dialogue.translation: 这是团队的努力。我对结果很满意。

dialogue.text: Good morning class. Let us begin the lesson.
dialogue.translation: 同学们早上好。我们开始上课。

dialogue.text: Good morning teacher. I have a question.
dialogue.translation: 老师早上好。我有个问题。

dialogue.text: Of course. What would you like to ask?
I do not understand the homework. Can you explain it again?
dialogue.translation: 我不理解作业。您能再解释一遍吗？

dialogue.text: Sure, let me show you on the board.
Thank you. That makes sense now.
Good morning class. Let us begin the lesson.

What should we do this weekend?
I want to watch a movie. There is a new one out.
dialogue.translation: 我想看电影。有新片上映。

dialogue.text: That sounds like fun. What time does it start?
dialogue.translation: 听起来很有趣。几点开始？

dialogue.text: The evening show is at eight. Let us book tickets now.
dialogue.translation: 晚场八点。我们现在订票吧。

dialogue.text: Good idea. I will check the prices online.
dialogue.translation: 好主意。我在网上查查价格。

dialogue.text: Perfect. We will have a great time.
dialogue.translation: 太好了。我们会玩得很开心。

dialogue.text: Please help! This is an emergency.
Stay calm. Tell me what happened.
dialogue.translation: 保持冷静。告诉我发生了什么。

dialogue.text: There has been an accident. Someone is hurt.
I will call for help right now. Where are you?
dialogue.translation: 我马上叫救援。你在哪里？

dialogue.text: We are at the main road near the bridge.
dialogue.translation: 我们在桥附近的主路上。

dialogue.text: Stay where you are. Help is on the way.
Please help! This is an emergency.
Stay calm. Tell me what happened.
dialogue.translation: 保持冷静。告诉我发生了什么。

I will call for help right now. Where are you?
dialogue.translation: 我马上叫救援。你在哪里？

dialogue.text: We are at the main road near the bridge.
dialogue.translation: 我们在桥附近的主路上。

dialogue.text: Stay where you are. Help is on the way.
Hello, I would like to open an account.
Welcome. Do you have your identification?
Yes, here is my passport.
Thank you. Please fill out this form.
Is there a minimum deposit required?
Yes, the minimum is one hundred dollars.

Hello, I need to check in for my flight.
dialogue.translation: 你好，我要办理登机手续。

dialogue.text: May I see your passport and booking?
dialogue.translation: 请出示护照和预订信息。

dialogue.text: Here you go. Can I get a window seat?
dialogue.translation: 给您。我能要靠窗座位吗？

dialogue.text: Let me check. Yes, there is one available.
Great. How many bags can I check?
dialogue.translation: 太好了。我能托运几件行李？

dialogue.text: You can check two bags for free.

Good morning! Time to wake up.
What is for breakfast today?
I made toast, eggs, and fresh fruit.
dialogue.translation: 我做了吐司、鸡蛋和新鲜水果。

dialogue.text: That looks delicious. Thank you.
What do you want to do this weekend?
Let us go to the park and enjoy the weather.
dialogue.translation: 我们去公园享受好天气吧。

What is for breakfast today?
I made toast, eggs, and fresh fruit.
dialogue.translation: 我做了吐司、鸡蛋和新鲜水果。

dialogue.text: That looks delicious. Thank you.
What do you want to do this weekend?
Let us go to the park and enjoy the weather.
dialogue.translation: 我们去公园享受好天气吧。

dialogue.text: Did you check the weather today?
Yes, it says it will be sunny and warm.
Perfect! We should go outside.
dialogue.translation: 太棒了！我们应该出去走走。

dialogue.text: I agree. Let us take a walk in the park.
dialogue.translation: 同意。我们去公园散步吧。

dialogue.text: I love this time of year. The weather is great.
dialogue.translation: 我喜欢这个季节。天气真好。

dialogue.text: Me too. Let us enjoy it while it lasts.
dialogue.translation: 我也是。我们趁好天气多享受吧。

dialogue.text: Can you help me with my computer?
What is the problem?
It is running very slowly and I do not know why.
dialogue.translation: 运行很慢，我不知道为什么。

dialogue.text: Have you tried restarting it? Sometimes that helps.
dialogue.translation: 你试过重启吗？有时有用。

dialogue.text: I will try that now. Thank you for the suggestion.
If it still does not work, call me and I will take a look.

Do you want to exercise with me?
Sure! What kind of sport do you like?
I enjoy running and swimming. How about you?
dialogue.translation: 我喜欢跑步和游泳。你呢？

dialogue.text: I prefer team sports like basketball or football.
dialogue.translation: 我更喜欢篮球或足球这样的团队运动。

dialogue.text: We should try both. It is good to mix it up.
dialogue.translation: 我们都试试。混合运动有好处。

dialogue.text: Good idea. Let us start with a run today.
dialogue.translation: 好主意。我们今天先从跑步开始。

dialogue.text: Hello, I would like a haircut please.
Welcome. What style are you looking for?
I want something short and easy to manage.
This style would suit you very well.
Yes, I like it. How much does it cost?
It is thirty dollars. It will take about an hour.

Hello, can you hear me?
Yes, I can hear you clearly.
I am calling to confirm our meeting tomorrow.
dialogue.translation: 我打电话确认明天的会议。

dialogue.text: Thank you for calling. Yes, I will be there at ten.
dialogue.translation: 谢谢来电。是的，我十点到。

dialogue.text: Perfect. I look forward to seeing you.
See you tomorrow. Take care.

Are you a confident person?
Not really. I am actually quite shy.
You should be more brave. It helps in life.
dialogue.translation: 你应该更勇敢一点。这对生活有帮助。

dialogue.text: I am curious about how you stay so calm.
dialogue.translation: 我很好奇你是怎么保持这么冷静的。

dialogue.text: I try to be honest with myself and others.
dialogue.translation: 我努力对自己和他人诚实。

dialogue.text: That is a responsible way to live.
dialogue.translation: 那是一种负责任的生活方式。

dialogue.text: Being independent is important too.
You seem very mature for your age.
dialogue.translation: 你看上去比实际年龄成熟。

dialogue.text: I used to feel anxious but I learned to manage stress.
dialogue.translation: 我以前很焦虑，但学会了管理压力。

dialogue.text: Your words are sincere and genuine. I appreciate that.
dialogue.translation: 你的话真诚而真实。我很感激。

dialogue.text: What a relief to finally finish the project.
dialogue.translation: 终于完成了项目，真是一种解脱。

dialogue.text: I know. It brings me great comfort.
dialogue.translation: 我知道。这给了我很大的安慰。

dialogue.text: I feel a sense of peace now that it is done.
dialogue.translation: 完成后我感到一种平静。

dialogue.text: The satisfaction of completing it is real.
dialogue.translation: 完成它的满足感是真实的。

dialogue.text: I did not want to disappoint the team.
You did great. Do not frustrate yourself.
dialogue.translation: 你做得很好。不要让自己沮丧。

dialogue.text: The details can confuse anyone.
I was worried I would embarrass myself.
But I stayed interested the whole time.
I was never bored. You kept it lively.
dialogue.translation: 我一点也不无聊。你让气氛很活跃。

dialogue.text: You seem so energetic and relaxed now.
dialogue.translation: 你现在看起来精力充沛又放松。

dialogue.text: I was tense before, but now I feel eager to start the next one.
dialogue.translation: 我之前很紧张，但现在我很期待开始下一个。

dialogue.text: I prefer natural ingredients in my food.
dialogue.translation: 我更喜欢食物中的天然成分。

dialogue.text: I agree. Artificial flavors do not taste as good.
dialogue.translation: 我同意。人工香料没那么好吃。

dialogue.text: This restaurant is nothing ordinary.
dialogue.translation: 这家餐厅一点都不普通。

dialogue.text: Yes, their menu is quite unique.
dialogue.translation: 是的，他们的菜单很独特。

dialogue.text: It is rare to find such quality.
This is not your typical fast food place.
dialogue.translation: 这不是你典型的快餐店。
